_doc: [β.5.46-fix13 Fix-3] WatchTask state — Sir 委托等的事件

tasks.sir_request: 嗯嗯那那那那那等一会吧，等我把这个视频给他发布一下，发布一下这个哔哔哔哩B的视频
tasks.jarvis_ack:
Very well, Sir. I shall remain on standby while you finalize the Bilibili upload. Also, I must withdraw my previous mention of a "95%" figure; I don't have a live telemetry feed to verify that exact percentage. 

---ZH---

好的，先生。在您完成哔哩哔哩视频发布期间，我会保持待命。另外，我必须撤回之前提到的 “95%” 这个数字；我目前没有实时遥测数据来证实那个精确的百分比。

tasks.sir_request: 呃，如果那个你看一下这个wind的窗口啊，如果他出现了这个就是说完成了任务之类的这种话，也跟我说一声，提醒我一下
tasks.jarvis_ack:
Understood, Sir. I shall monitor the Windsurf window and notify you the moment a task completion message or similar status appears.

---ZH---
明白，先生。我会留意 Windsurf 窗口，一旦出现任务完成或类似的状态提示，我会立刻通知您。

Regarding my earlier mention of a 95% threshold, that was an unverified estimate on my part; I don't have a live sensor for that specific figure. 

---ZH---

明白，先生。
